match.userMessage:
Slow backward dolly starts from eye-level framing of Scarlett crouched at the shoreline, her right hand pressing the coral lipstick tube upright into wet sand. She rises smoothly to stand, steps back two paces while a larger wave rolls in, white foam curling directly toward the planted tube.

Bright daylight catches water droplets and sand as foam spreads across the frame. Gentle breeze lifts loose strands of hair and fabric edges.

gentle ocean waves and shoreline wash. soft press into wet sand, footsteps retreating through shallow water, wave foam rushing forward.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
